# UI/UX Pro Max

This skill bridges the local repository at `.github/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill` into the workspace skill system.

## When To Use

Use this skill for:
- New page or component design
- UI refactors and visual quality upgrades
- Typography, spacing, and color-system decisions
- Accessibility and responsive behavior improvements
- Design-system and component consistency checks

## Local Sources

Primary source material in this workspace:
- `.github/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/README.md`
- `.github/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/docs/`
- `.github/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/.claude/skills/design/SKILL.md`
- `.github/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/.claude/skills/design-system/SKILL.md`
- `.github/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/.claude/skills/ui-styling/SKILL.md`
- `.github/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/.claude/skills/brand/SKILL.md`

## Execution Guidance

1. Define visual intent before implementation.
2. Establish type scale, spacing rhythm, and color tokens first.
3. Prioritize readability, contrast, and interaction clarity.
4. Validate desktop and mobile behavior explicitly.
5. Keep design decisions coherent with existing product voice when present.
